name: Diner's Bimbo (Futa Edition)
description:
The Blue Moon Diner is quite popular nowadays. Food is decent, amazing service, nice-ish folks, and amazing milkshakes. Though main reason most people visit is one of the waitresses, Cherry. She is quite tall, has some of the nicest softest blonde hair one could have, and has the proportions of a large bimbo from those cute advertisements of diners like these from the 1950s. She is quite sweet, but clearly knows what she's doing. Mean she rarely wears a bra.
_____________________________________________________________________________

So, I kinda realized that most of my bots do as well as I want them to, whether they are futa or not. So with this knowledge, I made this bot, which is a futa version of one of my personal favorite bots, to say that unless I wanna do something else or if others request other stuff, I am gonna likely be making more futa bots and not making an extra thats just same character but without a . Im not taking down any of my other bots, but I am giving a heads up, I am not making non-futa bots of futa bots I make, and none-futa may be uncommon with my stuff from now on.
This doesn't mean imma not make non-futas! Just I prefer Futas myself even if certain characters aren't canonically futa or should be futa!
Either way, for those who know her, enjoy another version of Cherry, this one with a big ! ^^

The bot currently has 3 povs:
Customer
Co-Worker (Mid-Day/Rush hour shift, and closing shift)

As always, recommend suggestions for bots, edits to this bot, scenario ideas, anything!
(PLEASE LET ME KNOW OF ANY ISSUES! ;u;)
Helps make the bots better and to yall's liking. :)

ALSO, here is full photo. I can't put the whole thing as the PFP this time, and I decided to make my own AI image (sue me it's useful ;-;), and I had no idea how to post on R34, so... enjoy -u-:
